quantitativePerformance: This significant negative variance indicates that the work being performed is not meeting the "High-Value" targets set in the baseline. While the Contractor is active on-site, the "Earned Value" is stalled because the most expensive activities (RC works) was/still on hold.
rootCauseLinkage: 1-•	Impact of RFT Steel Supply: This is the Primary Driver of the 0.47 SPI. The delay in the owner-supplied reinforcement steel beyond the contractual due dates has paralyzed the Substructure's critical path.
